snippet.title: CG5 - Not Supposed To Love Me [Ode to JAX] (The Amazing Digital Circus Song Animation)
snippet.description:
STREAM "Not Supposed To Love Me" NOW ▶ https://cg5.lnk.to/NotSupposedToLoveMe

Song by @CG5
Animation by @CodaAnim
Guitars by @FamilyJules7X

Follow CG5's social media:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Follow @cg5live105, @cg5covers107, & @cg5instrumentals461
Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LYRICS:

I’ve abandoned hope,
Looking for something that was real.
I’ll try not to think about it,
I don’t want to feel.
Cuz it’s all just too much to carry.
It’s all much too wrong.
I’ve lived in levity so long.

I'm forever haunted by the choices that I made.
A weight beyond imagining that never seems to fade.
For every scar I've left behind comes back to me in waves.
I run from love, I run away.

Cuz despite it all, I’m fine,
Despite the pain we shared.
I told you stories, told you lies.
I never shoulda dared open the door.
The tears of the past mean nothing anymore.
And you’re not supposed to miss me.

To hell with everyone,
Who ever swore they’d help me,
Don’t you tell me what I want.
Or what I need, cuz I’m the bigger man.
I’m never looking back,
And you won’t see me again.
Cuz you’re not supposed to love me.

Family fell apart, made me feel like I was weak.
So I cut them from my life, my feelings buried far beneath.
No, I do not deserve to be forgiven of my sins.
Shut up and leave me in ruins.

Cuz despite it all, I’m fine,
Despite the pain we shared.
I told you stories, told you lies.
I never shoulda dared open the door.
The tears of the past mean nothing anymore.
And you’re not supposed to miss me.

To hell with everyone,
Who ever swore they’d help me,
Don’t you tell me what I want.
Or what I need, cuz I’m the bigger man.
I’m never looking back,
And you won’t see me again.
Cuz you’re not supposed to love me.

You’re making this so hard.
Won’t let me disappear.
Somehow you see me in the dark.
Too long I lived in fear, now it’s too late.
No I don’t want to go,
But I chose my own fate,
I hate you, but you’ll still miss me.

So thank you everyone,
Whoever tried to help me.
After all that’s said and done,
You held me close, and made me understand.
But I’ll never come back,
And you won’t see me again.
Cuz you’re not supposed to love me.
No!
You’re not supposed to love me.
No!
You’re not supposed to love me.

Lots more Marvel Trailers coming Avengers Doomsday Trailers and more Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer footage. I'll try to finish my videos for everything as soon as possible.

LYRICS-----------

Dearly beloved,
For your entertainment, it's my pleasure to introduce to you Hell’s latest arrival;
The equal-opportunity killer, Alastor!

Hello, it’s nice to meet you!
Can you tell me where I am?
I don’t know how I got here
But I think I’m starting to understand.
I don’t belong among the angels
And baby, that’s just fine with me.
The things I did up there were high school
But now I’m going for my degree

Hey
Sorry, but you just got in my way
I promise, honey, I can feel your pain
And maybe I enjoy just a little bit
Does that make me insane?
Haven’t been the same since I expired
Doesn’t mean that I plan to retire
And now I have the power to bathe all of you in entertaining fire!

CHORUS -

Wait a minute, do I know you?
Weren’t you an old pal of mine?
Departed from us far too early
But now we’re meeting a second time.
We used to have such fun together
And maybe you have what I need
But first, I have one tiny question
Tell me, do you demons bleed?

CHORUS -

Hey
Sorry, but you just got in my way
I promise, honey, I can feel your pain
And maybe I enjoy just a little bit
Does that make me insane?
Haven’t been the same since I expired
Doesn’t mean that I plan to retire
And now I have the power to bathe all of you in entertaining fire!

Hey
Sorry, but you just got in my way
I promise, honey, I can feel your pain
And maybe I enjoy just a little bit
Does that make me insane?

END-----------

HELLO DDR's (Dedicated Description Readers)
What a crazy journey this has been... It's moments like this that put life into perspective! When we wrote this song 5 years ago, Nate had just gotten out of the Navy, I had just started shifting gears from Impressions to original music, and we were all trying to figure out how to make a living doing what we love: making music and videos.

Since then, my brother and I have written multiple charting records, been featured in Fortnite, NCIS, Poppy Playtime, Billie Bust Up, Garten of Ban Ban, and America's Got Talent (twice)! I became a pilot and bought my own airplane, Claire became a producer for Rob Riggle's podcast "Riggle's Picks", and Nate (is very private, but his life has also changed in so many ways). This song helped define the business that we run today and we couldn't be more grateful! So, to everyone who made this possible, THANK YOU!!!

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

snippet.title: Chris Brown - Deuces (Lyrics) Ft. Tyga, Kevin McCall
snippet.description:
#deuces #chrisbrown #tyga #kevinmccall #lyrics
Lyrics:

[Verse 1: Chris Brown, with Kevin McCall]
All that bullshit's for the birds
You ain't nothin' but a vulture-ure-ure-ure
Always hoping for the worst
Waiting for me to fuck up
You'll regret the day when I find another girl, yeah
That knows just what I need, she know just what I mean
When I tell her keep it drama free
(Whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa)
Chu-Chuckin' up them deuces
(Oh-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa)
Yeah, yeah, told you that I'm leaving, deuces
(Oh-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa)
Woah, oh
I know you mad, but so what? I wish you best of luck
And now I'm finna throw them deuces up

[Chorus: Chris Brown & Kevin McCall]
I'm on some new shit
I'm chuckin' my deuces up to her (Deuces)
I'm moving on to something better, better, better
No more tryna make it work (Deuces)
You made me wanna say bye-bye (Say bye-bye)
Say bye-bye (Say bye-bye)
Say bye-bye to her (Say bye-bye, deuces)
You made me wanna say bye-bye (Say bye-bye)
Say bye-bye (Say bye-bye)
Say bye-bye to her (Say bye-bye)

[Verse 2: Tyga & Chris Brown]
Uh, used to be Valentines, together all the time
Thought it was true love, but you know women lie
It's like I sent my love with a text two times
Call 'cause I care, but I ain't get no reply (No reply)
Tryna see eye to eye, but it's like we both blind
Fuck it, let's hit the club, I rarely sip but pour me some
'Cause when it's all said and done
I ain't gon' be the one that she can always run to
(Oh-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa)
I hate liars, fuck love, I'm tired of tryin'
My heart big, but it beat quiet
(Oh-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa)
I don't never feel like we vibin'
'Cause every time we alone, it's a awkward silence
(Oh-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa)
So leave your keys on the kitchen counter
And give me back that ruby ring with the big diamond
Shit, it's over, what you trippin' for?
I don't wanna have to let you go
But baby, I think it's better if I let you know

[Chorus: Chris Brown & Kevin McCall]
I'm on some new shit
I'm chuckin' my deuces up to her (Deuces)
I'm moving on to something better, better, better
No more tryna make it work, no (Deuces)
You made me wanna say bye-bye (Say bye-bye, bye-bye)
Say bye-bye (Say bye-bye, bye-bye)
Say bye-bye to her (Say bye-bye, oh-oh, deuces)
You made me wanna say bye-bye (Say bye-bye, bye-bye, bye-bye)
Say bye-bye (Say bye-bye)
Say bye-bye to her, yeah (Say bye-bye)

[Verse 3: Kevin McCall & Chris Brown]
Look, my shawty always on some bullshit like Chicago
So I flip that middle finger and the index finger follow
Deuces, we ain't got no future in tomorrow
I'm a dick, so it shouldn't be that hard to swallow
The other chick I'm with never complainin'
She make me wanna leave the one I'm with, Usher Raymond
Prolly didn't register, don't trip, later on it will
Shorty full of drama, like Gangsta Gri-zills
(Oh-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa)
I finally noticed it, it finally hit me
Like Tina did Ike in the limo, it finally hit me
(Oh-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa)
I got a new chick, and she ain't you
She Paula Patton thick. she give me déjà vu
(Oh-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa)
And all that attitude, I don't care about it
But all that shit I do for her, you gon' hear about it
Breezy rep two up, two down
But I'm just puttin' two up, chuckin' up the deuce now (Oh!)

[Chorus: Chris Brown & Kevin McCall]
I'm on some new shit
I'm chuckin' my deuces up to her, oh-oh (Deuces)
I'm moving on to something better, better, better (Better, baby)
No more tryna make it work, hey (Deuces)
You made me wanna say bye-bye (Say bye-bye)
Say bye-bye (Say bye-bye, say, say)
Say bye-bye to her (Say bye-bye, bye-bye, deuces)
You made me wanna say bye-bye (Say bye-bye)
Say bye-bye (Say bye-bye, say, say)
Say bye-bye to her (Say bye-bye), deuces

So, a new trailer just released for Spider-Man: Brand New Day. I’ve been deeply excited for this movie ever since the final moments of No Way Home and how that movie left the character.

     And from everything we’ve seen so far, and from how director Destin Daniel Cretton has been talking about the Wall Crawler, I think that “Brand New Day” is looking to be everything that I’ve wanted out of a Spider-Man movie.

From the return of Scorpion and the introduction of organic webs to the mysterious role of Sadie Sink and the inclusion of Hulk and Punisher. There is A LOT to unpack.

In this video, I’m breaking down the visual improvements, the Sam Raimi-esque focus on Peter Parker's humanity, and my theories on where this story is actually going.

Acá entre nos, siempre te voy a recordar

Que ya no puedo soportar, que estoy odiando sin odiar
Porque respiro por la herida

snippet.title: Grupo Firme & Gerardo Coronel - Qué Onda Perdida (Letra/Lyrics)
snippet.description:
👤 Artista | Grupo Firme, Gerardo Coronel
💿 Canción | Qué Onda Perdida
📅 Fecha de Lanzamiento | 29/03/2023
🔊 Géneros Musicales | Regional Mexicano

✨ Acerca de la Canción:
"Qué Onda Perdida" de Grupo Firme y Gerardo Coronel es una historia de arrepentimiento, nostalgia y segundas oportunidades. La canción retrata a alguien que regresa buscando recuperar a la persona que perdió, aferrándose a los recuerdos y a la esperanza de que el amor aún no haya terminado.

📲 Sígue a "Grupo Firme" en:
▶️ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFlC8U0Uif2hF0FIgsSIIYQ

⭐ Encuéntrame en Redes:
🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jostland_/
🌐 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/josstland/
🎵 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@iamjostland
📬 Contacto Directo por Instagram: @jostland_

🎶 [ Letra / Lyrics ] 🎶

(¡Échele, mi compa Jerry!)
(¿Y dónde andas, peleonera, que no te escucho? jaja)
(Qué va, chiquitita)

¿Qué onda, perdida?
Soy tu ex, el último de tus amores
Me tomé el atrevimiento de mandarte flores
Si las recibes, por favor, sonríe, no llores

Ya ves, perdida
Uno siempre vuelve a dónde lo quisieron
No me bloqueaste del WhatsApp y eso para mí es nuevo
Me da a pensar que podemos comenzar de nuevo

¿Qué onda, perdida?
Ya volvió el cabrón que más te ha querido
Y aunque no quieras saber de mí, te digo
No te puedo olvidar y la neta tampoco he querido

¿Qué onda, perdida?
Te me alistas porque hoy te llevo la banda
Y no me voy a ir de tu casa hasta que salgas
Hoy te quiero mirar pa’ que me digas en la cara

Que ya no me quieres, que tú no me extrañas
Y que alguien mejor está ocupando tu cama

(¡Ay, chiquitita!)
(¡Cómo la quiero!)
(Y dice que alguien mejor, compa, jajaja)
(No creo, batalloza)
(No se puede)

(¡Mi compa Jerry!)
(¡Y puro Grupo Firme!)
(¡Jálese, viejo!)

¿Qué onda, perdida?
Ya volvió el cabrón que más te ha querido
Y aunque no quieras saber de mí, te digo
No te puedo olvidar y la neta tampoco he querido

¿Qué onda, perdida?
Te me alistas porque hoy te llevo la banda
Y no me voy a ir de tu casa hasta que salgas
Hoy te quiero mirar pa’ que me digas en mi cara

Que ya no me quieres, que tú no me extrañas
Y que alguien mejor está ocupando tu cama

#GrupoFirme #GerardoCoronel #QuéOndaPerdida

snippet.title: Payaso X Ley,  Befocus Music, Ernesto Losa - COSITA (VIDEO OFICIAL)
snippet.description:
Payaso X Ley x Ernesto Losa - COSITA (Video Oficial) | El Hit Urbano Definitivo 2026 🚀

Prepárate para escuchar el himno que va a romper todas las discotecas y playlists urbanas este año. "COSITA" une el talento explosivo de Payaso X Ley y Ernesto Losa bajo el sello visionario de Befocus Music en una sobredosis de dembow, fronteo y flow imparable. Si estabas buscando la verdadera esencia del género urbano con un ritmo que te obliga a moverte, este video es una experiencia audiovisual imprescindible. Sube el volumen, únete a la ola y descubre por qué todos están hablando de este junte.

Este video oficial de "COSITA" es la respuesta definitiva para los usuarios que buscan descubrir lo último en tendencias de música urbana, reggaeton y cubatón. Optimizado para dominar las pistas de baile y los challenges virales, el tema explora la picardía y la vida nocturna a través de barras directas y un beat magnético de alta energía. Es el contenido musical perfecto para quienes desean estar al día con los ritmos latinos más pegadizos de la escena actual.

Siguiendo la poderosa ola de éxitos de grandes exponentes del género como El Taiger, Wampi, Oniel Bebeshito y Chocolate MC, "COSITA" se posiciona como el nuevo banger indispensable del movimiento urbano. Un junte estelar que captura la misma vibra de las colaboraciones más fuertes que hoy dominan las listas de Billboard Latino, Spotify Charts y las calles de Miami y La Habana.

LETRA
Por ley, tiene maldad y también su cosita bien.
Para hacerse sus cositas, todo ella lo hace bien para atenderla.
Se puso pelo tentáculo para destrozarte la cosita...
Es que es mucha guapería, velocidad la que te trae.
Tiene habilidad para hacerse su cosita, ella lo hace bien.
Dice, dice, tiene más instinto, tremenda velocidad de la niña más fina.
Sabe qué se pone, andan con tarjeta, andan con cash.
Melodías, velocidad la que te trae...
Andamos con agua y entero, andamos con tipos que no son nada lo que quiero.
Soy el tanque, yo no quiero intriga...
(Coro repetitivo) Y también su cosita, ella lo hace bien...

CRÉDITOS Y PRODUCCIÓN
🎵 Tema: COSITA
🎤 Artistas: Payaso X Ley, Ernesto Losa
🎬 Producción y Sello: Befocus Music
📅 Año de Lanzamiento: 2026


#PayasoXLey #ErnestoLosa #BefocusMusic #Cosita #Reggaeton2026 #MusicaUrbana #Cubaton #Reparto #TendenciasMusicales #HitsLatinos #TikTokViral

Melodías, velocidad la que te trae...
Andamos con agua y entero, andamos con tipos que no son nada lo que quiero.
Soy el tanque, yo no quiero intriga...
(Coro repetitivo) Y también su cosita, ella lo hace bien...
